summary: Advance Cash Lock Execution-Phase Filtering - All 9 tests passed. Cash lock now correctly filters to execution-phase receipts only. Pre-signoff receipts are excluded, and commitments come from execution_ledger liabilities.
passed_tests: test_02_proj_0a79eb51_lock_status_execution_phase_only - Pre-signoff receipt (25000) excluded, post-signoff receipt (5000) included
test_05_bulk_lock_status_execution_phase_filtering - Bulk endpoint also filters to execution phase
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advance Cash Lock execution-phase filtering verified. Key changes: 1) Total Received only counts receipts after signoff_locked_at OR with execution stage names, 2) Pre-signoff receipts are excluded from cash lock calculations, 3) Commitments come from execution_ledger liabilities (source='execution_ledger') + approved expense requests. Test projects: proj_0a79eb51 (signoff_locked_at=2026-01-31T19:15:51, pre-signoff receipt=25000 EXCLUDED, post-signoff receipt=5000 INCLUDED, safe_to_use=750), proj_17942869 (not signed off, 0 execution receipts).

proj_17942869.reason: Not signed off and no execution-stage named receipts

receipt_inclusion_criteria: OR receipt stage_name matches execution stages (production, delivery, installation, handover, final payment, etc.)
commitment_sources: finance_liabilities with source='execution_ledger' and status in ['open', 'partially_settled']
execution_phase_logic.safe_to_use_formula: max(0, Execution Received - Net Locked - Total Commitments)
